title: Ultimate Internet Kiddies
wikitext:
[]: Ultimate Internet Kiddies?             Quote Post by Formless One » Mon Jul 21, 2008 12:15 am Asuka, Shinji, Rei, Kaworu, Touji, Hikari, and Kensuki have just discovered the internet and forum posting. What kinds of boards would they each be attracted to? What kinds of posters would they be, based off their personalities? If you ran across them on a board, do you think you could recognize them by their behavior? How would you react to them? What are the odds of them keeping a stable account, i.e. not get banned for childish behavior? If they came here, how would they act? I'll kick this off by proposing that no matter where Asuka goes, she is likely to be deemed a troll because of her desire for attention from people. What say you?

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Mon Jul 21, 2008 12:26 am Kensuke would definitely be a 4channer, probably spending most of his time there lurking on /k/. Rei doesn't seem like much of an internet person. Neither does Kaworu. Can't think of anything about the others though...

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Mon Jul 21, 2008 12:29 am Why wouldn't Koworu? He seems to have an interest in human nature. It might shatter his faith in humanity, but I'd think he'd want to know regardless.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jul 21, 2008 1:01 am I am trying to remember the title of the fanfic in which they happen to stumble across fanfiction.net and start reading the NGE fics...

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Jul 21, 2008 1:40 am Asuka: textbook case myspace whore Shinji: constantly looking for new itunes Rei: is it possible to fail a personality quiz? Kwarou: too busy getting lost on wikipedia to do that whole NERV thing Kensuke: 4chan addiction... it isn't pretty Toji: endlessly browsing free preview pics of various porn sites hikari: endlessly browsing free preview pics of other various porn sites

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Mon Jul 21, 2008 12:30 pm Ah, I forgot about Myspace. I always thought those people were pitiful. Who cares how many people are your "friends" if you have never met any of them, online or, even better, in person? I can see Kensuke as a 4channer, but I can also see him as a YouTube broadcaster, since he's always got that camera on him early on in the series. Edit: What makes you think that Hikari would be a porn addict? Touji maybe...

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Mon Jul 21, 2008 12:59 pm Mr. Tines wrote: I am trying to remember the title of the fanfic in which they happen to stumble across fanfiction.net and start reading the NGE fics...

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Jul 21, 2008 1:06 pm Formless One wrote: Edit: What makes you think that Hikari would be a porn addict? Touji maybe...

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Mon Jul 21, 2008 2:16 pm On this board: Asuka would be telling everyone why they're wrong. Shinji wouldn't ever post, but he'd constantly be checking to see what other people are saying. Rei would make an account because someone told her too, then never come back. Kaworu would be constantly editing the Evapedia. Kensuke would constantly post image macros and other things of that nature. A 4channer, as some people said. Dunno about Toji and Hikari.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Jul 21, 2008 8:01 pm Kensuke on 4Chan? Bah. He'd more likely go straight to guns.ru and never leave.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Mon Jul 21, 2008 8:30 pm If Kaworu was trying to learn about the human race through the internet, he'd come to the conclusion that people love to indulge in an absurd array of sexual fetishes. Now, if this was before he met Shinji, he probably would have asked Shinji if they wanted to play with a cup when they meet for the first time.

[]:             Quote Post by Rhyno » Mon Jul 21, 2008 9:41 pm Gamer_2k4 wrote: Shinji wouldn't ever post, but he'd constantly be checking to see what other people are saying.

[]: Re: Ultimate Internet Kiddies?             Quote Post by bioweapon680 » Mon Jul 21, 2008 10:03 pm Formless One wrote: Asuka, Shinji, Rei, Kaworu, Touji, Hikari, and Kensuki have just discovered the internet and forum posting. What kinds of boards would they each be attracted to? What kinds of posters would they be, based off their personalities? If you ran across them on a board, do you think you could recognize them by their behavior? How would you react to them? What are the odds of them keeping a stable account, i.e. not get banned for childish behavior? If they came here, how would they act? I'll kick this off by proposing that no matter where Asuka goes, she is likely to be deemed a troll because of her desire for attention from people. What say you?

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Jul 21, 2008 11:38 pm Toji and Hikari would both have Facebook and would constantly poke each other and write each other messages and have a bunch of friends. But....Toji would be a facebook stalker and look at all the drunk pics of slutty girls...and look at porn. Shinji probably would look for music on iTunes and then may have the balls to get a new media player. I also agree that he would never post in a forum, but he would read them all the time. I agree that Asuka would be a Myspace whore, as well as a facebook one. Kensuke would be into Youtube and all the other video sharing sites, due to his camera use. He may also belong to a young republicans club for his love of the military as well as look at other stuff of the such. Porn maybe too. Rei and Kaworu may look at and surf the internet, but nothing more than that.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Tue Jul 22, 2008 2:06 am I think Asuka will find new world to conquer and new people to humiliate in the turn-based browser strategy games like Kingdom of Loathing, TDZK (if it ever returns), and others I am not really familiar with. Shinji will go into an emotional spiral after visiting /b/ upon discovering how many stuff he can wank his wank with.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Tue Jul 22, 2008 8:57 am TheAyanamiOtaku wrote: Shinji will go into an emotional spiral after visiting /b/ upon discovering how many stuff he can wank his wank with.

[]:             Quote Post by Da Games Elite » Thu Jul 24, 2008 6:16 pm I'd say Asuka would be the world's biggest troll. She'd probably go on sites just to bash other people. And probably go on Myspace too. A lot. Shinji would never post on forums, probably just spend his days browsing...maybe going on hentai and porn sites. Kensuke would make himself at home on military sites. Toji and Hikari I can see spending a lot of time on porn sites! Don't know why, it just works. Kaworu would probably spend his days researching stuff on the internet, and Rei...well, she'd probably turn the computer on, and just stare blankly at the screen....

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Thu Jul 24, 2008 6:25 pm Actually, Rei may be better at repairing and programing a computer rather than actually using one.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Thu Jul 24, 2008 6:28 pm Rei the hacker... ME LIKE! (White hat hacker, of course)

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jul 24, 2008 9:56 pm Shinji would be on Adult Forums all the time discussing the bust size of every single hot actress in Hollywood.
